description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup design with a predominantly olive green and black color scheme, accented by red highlights on various controls and panels. The body is constructed with angular, modern lines and a robust, tactical appearance, including a full-length Picatinny rail on top for mounting optics or accessories. The trigger guard is large and integrated into the grip, which has a thumbhole configuration for ergonomic handling. The magazine is housed behind the grip, characteristic of bullpup rifles, and the stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, providing a short overall length. The barrel is short and ends flush with the front of the handguard, with no visible muzzle device. The rifle's surface appears to be made of a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a durable yet lightweight feel.
description: A compact, olive green and black bullpup rifle with red accents, integrated stock, and a full-length top rail. It features a modern, angular design with a thumbhole grip and short barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive green body, black grip with thumbhole, red controls, and full-length top rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, sight alignment, and compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same bullpup configuration, grip, and rear stock integration.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, rear sight, and the rifle's overall compactness.
